results.title: Suzie Bates: An era-defining legacy in numbers

results.title: Claude Tag Brings Ambient AI to Slack: Admins Have Until August 3 to Migrate
results.description: Enterprise AI Slack agent Claude Tag launched June 23 and replaces the old Claude in Slack app, which Anthropic auto-migrates on August 3. Admins have 36 days to configure channel-scoped memory, ambient mode, and agent identity controls before losing the choice of how Claude operates in their workspace.

results.title: Benefit ride raises more than $3,000 for injured Covington County deputy
results.description: An 88-mile ride through several counties in honor of Deputy Yates Rodney began at Columbia’s Number One Fire Station and ended at Bluff Street Park.

results.title: Croatia defeat “weird” – Ayew criticises “sloppy” Black Stars
results.description: Black Stars captain Jordan Ayew has urged Ghanaians to remain confident in the national team despite Saturday's defeat to Croatia, insisting that the setback has not dampened the players' spirit as they prepare for the knockout stage of the ongoing FIFA World Cup 2026.

results.title: Democrats Are Now Openly Talking About Packing The Supreme Court After President Trump’s Latest Wins
results.description: For years, Democrats have told America they are the ones defending democracy, norms, and institutions. Then the Supreme Court hands President Trump a few major wins, and suddenly they want to change the size of the Court. Rep. Pramila Jayapal went on Newsmax and said Democrats are “absolutely” talking about expanding the Supreme Court. That is the tell. The timing is impossible to miss. The Court just handed President Trump key immigration victories, and the response from the left is already shifting from legal argument to institutional redesign. When you cannot win the ruling, change the scoreboard. Breitbart reported the...

results.title: Gawai celebration reflects Sarawak’s unity, says Adam Yii
results.description: MIRI (June 28): The Gawai celebration observed by the Dayak community is not merely a festive occasion but a symbol of unity that forms Sarawak’s greatest strength, said Pujut assemblyman Adam Yii Siew Sang. He said Gawai Dayak also symbolises family values, the spirit of mutual cooperation, respect for one another and life as a [...] The post Gawai celebration reflects Sarawak’s unity, says Adam Yii appeared first on Borneo Post Online .

results.title: AI’s Great Contradiction: Can Technology Save Humanity While Consuming the Resources We Depend On?
results.description: Artificial intelligence is increasingly being heralded as humanity’s next great problem-solving tool. It promises breakthroughs in medicine, education, scientific research, climate modelling, and logistics. Governments, technology companies and investors are pouring billions into AI infrastructure in the belief that it will help solve some of the world’s most pressing challenges. Yet hidden within this technological [...] The post AI’s Great Contradiction: Can Technology Save Humanity While Consuming the Resources We Depend On? appeared first on Moguldom .

results.title: Colombia vs Portugal: How did a goalless draw send Colombia to the top of group K?
results.description: Colombia claimed top spot in Group K after a tense 0-0 draw with Portugal. A late disallowed goal denied victory, but the result secured a Round of 32 clash with Ghana as Portugal prepare to face Croatia.

results.title: Tom Holland and Zendaya: A Modern Love Story Beyond the Screen
results.description: Tom Holland and Zendaya have transformed their on-screen chemistry into a genuine romance that defies Hollywood norms. Their relationship, built on friendship and mutual support, showcases a refreshing approach to celebrity love stories. Unlike many of their peers, they prioritize privacy and authenticity, proving that a meaningful connection can thrive away from the public eye. As they navigate fame together, their bond continues to inspire fans, redefining what it means to be a couple in the spotlight. Discover how this modern love story is changing the narrative of celebrity romances.
